title: Strawberry Dosa Wrap
description: A sweet and savory Indian-inspired breakfast dish made with a crispy dosa, fresh strawberries, and fluffy wrap.
instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Brush the dosa batter with ghee or oil to prevent sticking.
Cook the dosa for 1-2 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Meanwhile, toast the fluffy wrap in the same skillet or griddle.
Assemble the wrap by placing the cooked dosa in the center, topped with sliced strawberries.
Drizzle with honey and sprinkle with cinnamon, if desired.
Roll the wrap tightly and serve immediately.
